title: microstylis graciliscapa
intro: Microstylis graciliscapa, also known as the Slender Lip Orchid, is a species of orchid found in tropical Asia. The plant is traditionally used in herbal medicine, where it is valued for its medicinal properties, which include its antibacterial and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Microstylis graciliscapa include its ability to aid in wound healing, reduce fever, and alleviate symptoms of respiratory infections. In herbal preparations, the plant is often used to make teas or infusions, and it can also be dried and used as a powder for medicinal purposes.
